'''Bescat Offdurmin''' was a [[Hologram/Legends|holo]]-entertainment mogul and pleasure-seeker from the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. He was the original owner of the ''[[Love Commander]]'', which he lost in a [[Gambling/Legends|game]] of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. His drunkenness at the time may have contributed to his loss. Lando later used Bescat's name as an alias while he, [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] made use of the ''Love Commander''.
